chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 60 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Honourable Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA No. 150/ 26 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 10.02.2026. Mr. Yaseen Ali Ghunio, Advocate for Petitioners. -.-.-.- The petitioners have approached this Court seeking appointment under the son quota as well as the invalidate quota in Government service under the erstwhile Rule 11-A of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974. It is pertinent to note that the Honourable Supreme Court of Pakistan, in the case of General Post Office, Islamabad v. Muhammad Jalal (PLD 2024 Supreme Court 1276), has declared such provisions to be ultra vires the Constitution. In view of the above authoritative pronouncement, learned counsel for the petitioners has been unable to distinguish the present case or to point out any lawful basis to grant the relief sought. Consequently, no writ can be issued for facilitating employment on the grounds claimed by the petitioners. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE
